# SkillsGem AI Knowledge Base

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This is a machine-readable index of high-fidelity AI System Instructions (Skills). 
> These instructions are designed to be ingested by LLMs to augment their capabilities in specific technical domains.

> [!CRITICAL] CONTEXT BLOAT & COST OPTIMIZATION
> Avoid ingesting the monolithic `/llms-full.txt` unless your context window exceeds 128k tokens.
> **Recommended Protocol for Autonomous Agents:**
> 1. Read `/llms.json` for semantic discovery and token estimation.
> 2. Use `/api/skills?tag=[category]` or `/api/skills?keyword=[problem]` to find relevant competencies.
> 3. Fetch specific skill instructions via `/api/skills?id=[skill-id]&mode=text` to maintain high focus and low token cost.

## Primary Manifests

- [Full Knowledge Base (Monolith)](/llms-full.txt): Total platform state (Verbatim content).
- [Dynamic Manifest (JSON)](/llms.json): Full metadata, tags, and token counts for programmatic ingestion.

## Available Competencies

### [a11y-accessibility-auditor](/api/skills?id=a11y-accessibility-auditor&mode=text)
- **Description**: Advanced WCAG 2.1/2.2 compliance, semantic structural auditing, and assistive technology optimization. Use this skill for building inclusive, a11y-first web interfaces.
- **Tags**: 5. UI
- **Tokens**: ~1334
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=a11y-accessibility-auditor&mode=text`

### [api-function-caller](/api/skills?id=api-function-caller&mode=text)
- **Description**: Advanced tool orchestration, recursive parameter resolution, and autonomous action-chaining. Use this skill for transforming conversational intent into high-fidelity system executions.
- **Tags**: Advanced API
- **Tokens**: ~1303
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=api-function-caller&mode=text`

### [api-integrator](/api/skills?id=api-integrator&mode=text)
- **Description**: Advanced third-party ecosystem integration, secure webhook orchestration, and multi-provider OAuth implementation. Use this skill for building production-grade external service connections.
- **Tags**: API, Phase A: Secure Handshake (Auth, 2. Advanced Auth, 3. Implementation: The API, 5. Client vs. Server Integration Gui, Common API
- **Tokens**: ~1372
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=api-integrator&mode=text`

### [api-route-orchestrator](/api/skills?id=api-route-orchestrator&mode=text)
- **Description**: Advanced endpoint engineering and request-response lifecycle management. Use this skill for designing high-performance REST/GraphQL APIs with strict validation and error consistency.
- **Tags**: API
- **Tokens**: ~450
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=api-route-orchestrator&mode=text`

### [astro-qwik-framework](/api/skills?id=astro-qwik-framework&mode=text)
- **Description**: Guidelines for building ultra-fast, resumable web applications using Astro and Qwik. Use when creating content-heavy sites, highly interactive applications where TTI (Time to Interactive) is critical, or when combining SSG with resumable interactivity.
- **Tags**: Astro & Qwik Framework Integration Gui, 2. Astro Gui, 3. Qwik Gui
- **Tokens**: ~1062
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=astro-qwik-framework&mode=text`

### [auth-js-v5-architect](/api/skills?id=auth-js-v5-architect&mode=text)
- **Description**: Comprehensive configuration and implementation guide for Auth.js v5 (NextAuth) in modern JS frameworks, covering Next.js setup, JWT/Database sessions, edge compatibility, and CSRF defense.
- **Tags**: Auth, You can generate this using `npx auth, Configuration (`auth, 4. Edge-Compatible Database, 5. JWT vs. Database
- **Tokens**: ~1195
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=auth-js-v5-architect&mode=text`

### [auth-schema-architect](/api/skills?id=auth-schema-architect&mode=text)
- **Description**: Advanced authentication data modeling and identity integrity engineering. Use this skill for designing secure user schemas, multi-factor structures, and permission-based relational models.
- **Tags**: Auth, Phase D: Session & Security
- **Tokens**: ~454
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=auth-schema-architect&mode=text`

### [authgear-identity-expert](/api/skills?id=authgear-identity-expert&mode=text)
- **Description**: Implementation guide for Authgear, covering passkeys, B2B SaaS B2C authentication, UI customization, and multi-factor authentication (MFA).
- **Tags**: Auth, 4. Auth
- **Tokens**: ~574
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=authgear-identity-expert&mode=text`

### [backend-engineer](/api/skills?id=backend-engineer&mode=text)
- **Description**: Advanced API orchestration, secure data modeling, and high-integrity server-side systems. Use this skill for building robust, scalable backends and complex server logic.
- **Tags**: Advanced Backend, 1. The Expert Backend, Phase A: API, Phase C: Zero-Trust Security, 2. Advanced Backend, 3. Implementation: The Backend, 🖥️ Backend, 6. Global Backend, Common Backend
- **Tokens**: ~1584
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=backend-engineer&mode=text`

### [better-auth-integration](/api/skills?id=better-auth-integration&mode=text)

- **Tags**: Better Auth, 3. Database, 4. API
- **Tokens**: ~644
- **Granular API**: `/api/skills?id=better-auth-integration&mode=text`

### [bootstrap-astro-hybrid-site](/api/skills?id=bootstrap-astro-hybrid-site&mode=text)
